channel.title: Ente development digest
channel.description: AI-generated daily digest of PRs opened and merged in the Ente monorepo

item.title: Ente digest Jul 23, 2026 - 19 shipped, 4 in progress
item.description:
Today’s shipped work focuses on faster and more capable on-device processing in Photos and new on-device knowledge packs in Ensu. There are also several usability fixes across web and mobile, plus self-hosting and account-recovery improvements.

Shipped

  • Photos mobile: Major ML indexing optimizations reduce processing overhead and improve portability across iOS CoreML and Android WebGPU/XNNPACK. Unassigned face clusters can now be linked to contacts, and face clusters are sorted by photo count to make that picker easier to use.
  • Ensu: Opt-in on-device knowledge packs add downloadable, searchable packs with local retrieval, source citations, and controls to download, update, cancel, and enable them.
  • Photos mobile: Contact-first avatars now prefer saved contact names and photos across search, sharing, and family views. Incoming shared photos in Memories now show the favourite icon, and family member names appear on the storage-limit page.
  • Photos web: Chromecast receiver compatibility was fixed, while download toasts can now be dismissed when retries do not help.
  • Platform and self-hosting: Account recovery no longer races account cleanup; self-hosted API path prefixes are preserved; and the recent server CORS changes were reverted to simplify self-hosting.
  • Smaller shipped fixes include long user-agent handling in logout confirmation and access-token use for mobile family requests.

In progress

  • Server: Find scheduled deletions by email, retaining a keyed email hash for admin lookup and recovery verification.
  • Documentation: Add FAQ entries across the Auth, Photos, and Locker docs.
  • Ensu: Remove the parking_lot dependency.
  • Auth: Add DonanımHaber icon data to the custom icon set.
